name: knick-knackery
description: Save AI chat context as Keep-style markdown notes with local or cloud LLM summarization.

knick-knackery.aiEngine.description: Choose which AI engine to use for summarization.

knick-knackery.ollamaModel.description: The name of the local Ollama model to use (e.g., llama3.2:1b, llama3, mistral).

knick-knackery.anthropicModel.description: The Anthropic model to use for cloud summarization.

knick-knackery.vertexProjectId.description: (If using Vertex) The Google Cloud Project ID for Vertex AI.

knick-knackery.vertexRegion.description: (If using Vertex) The GCP region where the Claude model is hosted.

knick-knackery.vertexAdcPath.description: (If using Vertex) Absolute path to your Google Cloud Application Default Credentials JSON file.

knick-knackery.customPrompt.default:
You are a strict formatting bot. You MUST summarize the provided terminal interaction EXACTLY matching the structure of the TEMPLATE below. Do NOT invent your own headings. Do NOT add pleasantries.

=== TEMPLATE ===
### [8-Word Actionable Title]

**TL;DR:** [1-2 sentence summary.]

---

#### The Concept / Problem
[2-3 sentences explaining the goal or issue.]

#### Actionable Code / Commands
[Code blocks or "N/A".]

#### Key Takeaways & Caveats
* [Bullet point 1]
* [Bullet point 2]

**Context Tags:** #tag1 #tag2 #tag3
=== END TEMPLATE ===

Summarize the following interaction EXACTLY matching the template structure.

=== INTERACTION TO SUMMARIZE ===
{TEXT}
=== END INTERACTION ===

STRICT FORMATTED OUTPUT:
###
knick-knackery.customPrompt.description: Customize the prompt sent to the AI. Use {TEXT} where the terminal output should be injected.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
